rationale: The citing paper’s core framework models a multi-actor partially integrated channel and explicitly emphasizes extradyadic effects (manufacturer–retailer–sales force), which aligns closely with the cited paper’s triadic channel perspective and interdyadic tie constructs. Given this strong conceptual overlap in channel-governance structure, the citation is plausibly a substantive theoretical source rather than an incidental mention, even though the raw match only provides DOI-level evidence.
